canonical_answer: Two hands hold multiple tubes of paint over a large white rectangular canvas. One hand grips a blue tube labeled Winsor & Newton while the other holds three additional tubes including white and brown ones. The surface beneath the canvas is messy with dried paint splatters and clutter. Text overlays identifying the artist and website appear at the top and bottom of the frame.
